title: Doormaker
move_pattern: Starts with Dramatic Open (phase transition). Then cycles: Hunger → Scrutiny → Grasp → Hunger (repeating).
notes: The Doormaker begins combat disguised as a 'Door' with effectively infinite HP and no visible health bar. On its first turn (Dramatic Open), it reveals its true form — resetting its HP to 512, removing all powers, and applying 1 Hunger. After Dramatic Open, it cycles through three phases (Hunger → Scrutiny → Grasp), each swapping a cosmetic phase power (Hunger, Scrutiny, Grasp) that visually indicates the current phase. The Grasp move permanently weakens the player (-1 Strength and -1 Dexterity) while strengthening itself (+5 Strength) each cycle.
